title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Borosil Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Borosil Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Borosil Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Borosil Global Group:
Borosil Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
